tasks.label: post-rebuild:health-check
args: i=1; while [ $i -le 20 ]; do b=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/health || true); f=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001 || true); echo "try $i backend:$b frontend:$f"; if [ "$b" = "200" ] && [ "$f" = "200" ]; then exit 0; fi; i=$((i+1)); sleep 2; done; exit 1
